/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/E2E_Framework.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_001_green_triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_002_rgb_interpolation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_003_depth_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_004_mad_verification.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_005_multi_triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_006_warp_scheduling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_007_triangle_1tri.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_008_triangle_cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_009_triangle_cubes100.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_010_triangle_sponzastyle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_e2e.dir/scene_011_pbr_material.cpp.o -o ../../bin/test_e2e  ../../src/stages/libstages.a ../../src/pipeline/libpipeline.a ../../src/core/libcore.a ../../src/test/libtest.a /usr/lib64/libgtest_main.so.1.12.1 ../../src/stages/libstages.a ../../src/pipeline/libpipeline.a ../../src/stages/libstages.a ../../src/pipeline/libpipeline.a ../../src/utils/libutils.a ../../src/profiler/libprofiler.a ../../extern/imgui/libimgui.a /usr/lib64/libglfw.so.3.3 ../../src/core/libcore.a /usr/lib64/libgtest.so.1.12.1 -lpthread
